display.purpose: Landing page hero, major session onboarding. Lora only. Use sparingly — one or two elements per screen max.

headline.purpose: Page titles, scorecard category headings, major section breaks. Lora.

title.purpose: Card headings, modal titles, sidebar group titles. Plus Jakarta Sans 600.

body.purpose: Feedback paragraphs, critique text, descriptions. Plus Jakarta Sans 400. Max 70ch.

label.purpose: Section dividers, mode tags, status chips, nav sublabels. Plus Jakarta Sans 500 uppercase with tracking.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive practice-mode cards on hover only. Signals navigation target.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Full modals and sheet panels. Heaviest shadow — full context interruption.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Standard easing for all state transitions. Exit animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Launch session, submit, proceed.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #243763; color: #FDFBF7; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: normal; padding: 8px 20px; height: 36px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2e4a82; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 63, 181, 0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Cancel, back, alternate path.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; padding: 8px 20px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid #EDE3CC; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #F5EFE0; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 63, 181, 0.4); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. Sidebar items, inline controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #475569; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 8px 12px; height: 36px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F5EFE0; color: #0f172a; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 63, 181, 0.4); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Form entries, search.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { position: relative; width: 100%; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #EDE3CC; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; color: #0f172a; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #2e4a82; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(45, 91, 227, 0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Mode Selector Card
components.description: Practice mode entry point. Interactive navigation target from the dashboard.
components.css: .ds-mode-card { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 20px 24px; background: #FDFBF7; border: 1px solid #EDE3CC; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-mode-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-mode-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-mode-icon--sprint { background: rgba(26, 63, 181, 0.1); color: #243763; } .ds-mode-icon--conversation { background: rgba(13, 92, 107, 0.1); color: #0d5c6b; } .ds-mode-icon--free { background: rgba(180, 83, 9, 0.1); color: #b45309; } .ds-mode-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-mode-title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-mode-desc { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 400; color: #475569; margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-mode-arrow { color: #94a3b8; flex-shrink: 0; transition: color 200ms, transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-mode-card:hover .ds-mode-arrow { color: #475569; transform: translateX(2px); }

components.name: Score Chip
components.description: Semantic score indicator used in scorecards and feedback views.
components.html: GoodFairNeeds Work
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-chip--positive { background: rgba(26, 63, 181, 0.08); color: #243763; } .ds-chip--neutral { background: #F5EFE0; color: #475569; } .ds-chip--critical { background: rgba(240, 68, 56, 0.08); color: #b91c1c; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Primary sidebar navigation link. Default, hover, and active states.
components.html: Home Replays
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #F5EFE0; color: #0f172a; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #F5EFE0; color: #0f172a; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
Clarity lives in the space between a serious training environment and a considered, calm one. The visual system is designed for a person who is already focused — running drills before a high-stakes conversation. It should lower their cortisol, not compete for their attention.

The typographic system grounds the interface in quiet authority. Lora carries headers with editorial warmth, never theatrical. Plus Jakarta Sans handles body and UI text with humanist confidence.

Color is restrained. The cream and warm-white backgrounds dominate; the navy is precise and confident; the mode accent colors distinguish contexts without decorating them.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream surface, not cold white
Serif display type that reads as editorial calm, not academic formality
Mode accent colors that identify context at a glance
Flat-by-default elevation; shadow appears as functional state change only
Spacing that varies deliberately — denser in analysis views, more open in practice flows

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Navy, teal, and amber are semantic identifiers, not decorative fills. Combined, they cover less than 15% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Cream Purity Rule
rules.body: Never apply a colored tint to the cream backgrounds. The warmth of #FAF7F0 is the warmth of the brand. No gradients or colored overlays on top of it.

rules.name: The Serif Gate Rule
rules.body: Lora is reserved for headlines and display text only. Never use it for body copy, labels, UI controls, or interactive elements.

rules.name: The Weight Floor Rule
rules.body: Plus Jakarta Sans 400 is the minimum weight for any readable text. Never use 300 or below.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A static surface has no shadow. Shadows are responses to state — hover, open, or overlay — not decoration. If a shadow exists on a card at rest, it is wrong.

dos: Do use Lora for all headlines and page titles.
Do keep cream-base (#FAF7F0) as the dominant surface.
Do use the mode accent colors exclusively on icons and small semantic labels.
Do deepen shadows only in response to state: hover, open, or overlay.
Do let scorecard and feedback views breathe — wider line-heights, more vertical space.
Do cap all body text at 70ch line length.
Do use uppercase Label typography for wayfinding only.
donts: Don't use Lora for body copy, UI controls, or interactive elements.
Don't use purple, violet, or gradient fills anywhere in the UI.
Don't add streaks, badges, confetti, or gamified progress indicators.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-blur decoratively.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't apply neon accents, high-chroma brights, or dark backgrounds.
Don't let the cream backgrounds be mistaken for white — use #FDFBF7, not #ffffff.
Don't use Inter or Playfair Display — they are the replaced fonts.
